title: euphrasia officinalis var. campestris
intro: Euphrasia officinalis var. campestris, also known as field eyebright, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis var. campestris include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote respiratory health. It can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
